verdicts.reason: French onion soup in a crock with melted gruyère crust and croûtons on white plate — right dish
spaghetti with open clams in white wine sauce — right dish for spaghetti alle vongole
whole raw red cabbages at a market — ingredient shot, not finished spiced red cabbage
large round baked bun with powdered sugar — wrong format, spotted dick is a steamed suet pudding with currants not a bun
medjool dates close-up macro — ingredient shot again, not finished sticky toffee pudding
traybake with caramel toffee drizzle and lemon wheels, dates visible alongside — right dish for sticky toffee traybake
corn cobs boiling in a pot — not the finished off-cob dressed street corn salad
baked creamy white custard-style dish — wrong format, Sussex pond pudding is a steamed suet pudding with whole lemon inside
tagliatelle pasta with mushrooms in cream sauce in a patterned bowl — right dish
raw uncooked tagliatelle nests on plain background — ingredient shot, not finished tagliatelle with spinach mascarpone
raw potatoes in a pile — ingredient shot, not finished tartiflette
Japanese rice bowl with teriyaki beef and katsu fried items — wrong protein, not mushroom-based teriyaki rice bowls
sausages frying in a pan over open flames — no Yorkshire pudding batter, wrong format for toad in the hole
cherry and icing custard/Bakewell-style tarts — wrong dish, not treacle tart (golden syrup in shortcrust pastry)
colorful tuna pasta salad with tomatoes, peppers, corn and tuna in white bowl — right dish
raw gingerbread dough being cut with cookie cutters — process/prep shot, not finished baked gingerbread
dark chocolate round cake with a slice removed on white plate — right dish for vegan chocolate cake
heart-shaped shortbread biscuit beside a tea mug — wrong dish, not chocolate chip cookies
golden cinnamon sugar doughnuts on a wooden board — right dish for vegan cinnamon doughnuts
mini egg and vegetable frittata muffins with red peppers on a cooling rack — right dish
full English breakfast plate with pork sausages and bacon — includes meat, wrong for vegetarian full English
warm salad with caramelized pear slices on rocket/arugula greens with nuts and balsamic — right dish
adult and child cracking eggs into flour bowl — baking process shot, not finished Welsh cakes
cubed cheddar cheese on a wooden board — ingredient shot, not finished Welsh rarebit on toast
dark chocolate brownie square with caramel drizzle and pecan topping on a white plate — right dish
dry white cannellini beans in a bowl — ingredient shot, not finished white bean and rosemary soup
layered mousse in a glass with crumble base and berry topping — right format for white chocolate cardamom mousse
popcorn close-up — completely wrong dish, not cheesy garlic bread
chaotic Asian night market grill stall — not a styled finished yakitori dish
Scottish café breakfast plate with haggis and pastry items — wrong dish, not Yorkshire puddings
thin pasta with cranberries, pine nuts and herbs in a bowl — right format for zucchini pine nut cranberry paleo pasta
